Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Child

DEPRECATED Use <see cref="T:Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.ChildV2" /> ChildV2 instead. Represents a child of the user.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
PersonId

The child's unique id.

 integer

None.
FirstName

The child's first name.

 string

None.
LastName

The child's last name.

 string

None.
FullName

The child's full name.

 string

None.
